title: OptiDroid
description: A simple optimization modpack for Amethyst/Mojo/Zalith Launcher
body:
# OptiDroid
![banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24486244faad122f929fe3a5657198dad6466a78.png)

**OptiDroid** is specifically made for the **Amethyst/Mojo launcher**, but it will also work fine on desktop launchers or even on iOS. The idea behind this modpack was to bring together some of the best optimization mods that have been tested and proven to work within the **Amethyst/Mojo launcher**.

If you have experienced terrible frame rates with Minecraft in the past, then **OptiDroid** is the modpack for you. There are no gameplay mechanics included in this modpack. It is meant to improve the performance of Minecraft for players on low-end or even mid-range phones.

This modpack is based on **Fabric, Forge and NeoForge**, so further mods can easily be added on top of this.

The Mojo community has also recommended this modpack, so we know from their testing that it works.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/D8cz-I_A_l8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

In case you are experiencing any issues with this modpack, support is available on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/j8GTQv3YvY) server for the modpack. Simply drop your issue on the Discord server, and someone will assist you.

**This modpack contains the following (fabric only):**
- [BBE](https://modrinth.com/mod/ONZm0H7Y) by ceeden
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/g96Z4WVZ) by Thosea
- [Cloth Config v20](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g) by shedaniel
- [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/e0M1UDsY) by Rick South
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/VSNURh3q) by RelativityMC, ishland
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/LQ3K71Q1) by juliand665, LostLuma
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) by tr7zw
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) by FabricMC
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ha28R6CL) by FabricMC
- [Fast Noise](https://modrinth.com/mod/OnlVIpq5) by ZenXArch
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) by malte0811
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci) by RK\_01
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U) by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/fQEb0iXm) by tuxed
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/uLbm7CG6) by Jerozgen
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) by JellySquid, 2No2Name
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM) by Prospector, haykam821, TerraformersMC
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/TjSm1wrD) by embeddedt
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/51shyZVL) by FX \- PR0CESS, 1Foxy2
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/qQyHxfxd) by Aizistral
- [Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/eXts2L7r) by Patbox
- [Podium](https://modrinth.com/mod/fW8woQj4) by AndreasMelone
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bh37bMuy) by FlashyReese
- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ps1zyz6x) by Spottedleaf, ishland
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) by JellySquid \(jellysquid3\)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn) by FlashyReese
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/wnEe9KBa) by ishland
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/1eAoo2KR) by isXander
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/w7ThoJFB) by isXander
